name: SAIC Motor Corporation
message: SAIC Motor Corporation Limited is the largest state-owned automobile manufacturer in China and one of the "Big Four" in the country's automotive industry. Headquartered in Shanghai, the company's business covers the development, manufacture, and sale of passenger and commercial vehicles, as well as auto parts and financial services Market Capitalization (USD): approx. $23.83 � $23.9 Billion.
